{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Sage
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura Sage]] promised training support.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
